products.title: 38 Clipless Click Pen - 6Al-4V Titanium Conical Nose - C63000 Bronze Mechanism - OHTO C-305 Rollerball Refill
products.body_text: Please email to inquire about purchase. I am making as many as I have supplies for on hand. If you do not make it in for one of these I can offer you something that is like this, or something that is closer to your preferred style, material and refill, in the future. Heading back to a classic profile in a bronze neck arrangement. The mixed materials yields a very smooth and snappy action. Midweight 30.0g in a 0.38"(9.65 mm) diameter with a 6Al-4V Titanium body, C63000 Bronze mechanism, moderately grippy continuous texture, conical nose, and 6Al-4V Titanium button. Equipped with a luxurious yet delicate OHTO C-305 rollerball refill. The travel of the refill nose is supported throughout the travel yielding a smooth action. A captured element on the back of the refill prevents any rattle. The mechanism comes equipped with one stainless steel bearing ball and one borosilicate glass ball. Tip details are extremely tight with a small land between the refill and the conical section. Proper allowance and a custom precision spring allow the refill to operate very smoothly. There is a tight fit between the button stanchion and the mechanism body making it more resistant to binding from pressing the button on an angle. Higbee thread start to the pen body to make the thread action for replacing the refill better. Has the locking feature that keeps the mechanism from unscrewing without the need for an o-ring or loctite. This version is 5.26" (133.6 mm) long, 0.38" (9.65 mm) in diameter, and weighs 30.0 g (1.06 oz).

Please email to inquire about purchase.

Heading back to a classic profile in a bronze neck arrangement. The mixed materials yields a very smooth and snappy action.

Midweight 30.0g in a 0.38"(9.65 mm) diameter with a 6Al-4V Titanium body, C63000 Bronze mechanism, moderately grippy continuous texture, conical nose, and 6Al-4V Titanium button.

Equipped with a luxurious yet delicate OHTO C-305 rollerball refill. The travel of the refill nose is supported throughout the travel yielding a smooth action. A captured element on the back of the refill prevents any rattle. 

The mechanism comes equipped with one stainless steel bearing ball and one borosilicate glass ball. Tip details are extremely tight with a small land between the refill and the conical section.

Proper allowance and a custom precision spring allow the refill to operate very smoothly. There is a tight fit between the button stanchion and the mechanism body making it more resistant to binding from pressing the button on an angle. 

Higbee thread start to the pen body to make the thread action for replacing the refill better. Has the locking feature that keeps the mechanism from unscrewing without the need for an o-ring or loctite.

This version is 5.26" (133.6 mm) long, 0.38" (9.65 mm) in diameter, and weighs 30.0g (1.06 oz).

products.title: 55 Clipless Twist Pen - 6Al-4V Titanium Body - C63000 Bronze Top - Triple Bevel Nose - OHTO Ceramic ISO G2
products.body_text: Please email to inquire about purchase. This will be a limited design, and will be offered first to customers who have specifically requested a large diameter in the past. Thanks for following along, let me know what you think about this design and send requests for future designs. The largest diameter and shortest length pen I have ever made. The large diameter is a unique experience, and offers and alternative grip style that works just as well for doodling as well as offering excellent visibility for precision inking. A robust 50.0g in weight, measuring 0.55" in diameter, and an even 4.00" in length at the indicated retraction length. A groove shows up when the pen is properly retracted. Action is supplied by a triple started fast moving thread with a higbee start, making refill replacement easy. The thread action is smooth while having a moderate zippered texture to prevent unwanted spinning. Minimal and clean design for the universal ISO G2 refill, same as the Parker. Proper allowance and a custom precision spring allow the refill to operate smoothly. The included refill is an all metal needle tip 0.5mm OHTO PG-M05NP Ceramic Roller Gel. It is my new favorite refill for this format. This version is 4.00" (101.6 mm) long, 0.55" (13.97 mm) in diameter, and weighs 50.0 g (1.76 oz).

products.title: 38 Clipless Click Pen - C63000 Bronze Round Nose Body And Button - 6061 Aluminum Mechanism - OHTO C-307 Rollerball Refill
products.body_text: Please email to inquire about purchase. I will try to make as many as I can. Thanks for following along, let me know what you think about this design and send requests for future designs. A hefty design at 41.5g in a 0.38"(9.65 mm) diameter with a round nose section and moderate machining texture for grip. Smooth and tough C63000 Nickel Aluminum Bronze is shiny and will develop a darker patina over time. Equipped with the excellent OHTO C-307 rollerball refill. This refill has a particularly good dimensional design. Tip details allow fully supported travel through actuation and a captured element on the back of the refill prevents any rattle. Revised work holding and setup process keep mechanism details better in line than previous designs. No o-ring bumper for this design. Spring rates are pretty optimum removing the need for the bumper. Uses a 1/8" (0.125") bearing ball and a custom made precision secondary spring. Proper allowance and a custom precision spring allow the refill to operate very smoothly. There is a t ight fit between the button stanchion and the mechanism body making it more resistant to binding from pressing the button on an angle. The mechanism comes equipped with one stainless steel bearing ball and one borosilicate glass ball. Tip details are extremely tight with a small land between the refill, and the rounded section. Pinch the mechanism between your index finger and thumb to retract the mechanism with a satisfying snap. The click and return is very solid and super satisfying. Tolerances, fit and finish for the mechanism are very close. Tip point details are very clean with an excellent tight fitting 2.3 mm diameter bore and a tolerance of just 25 micron to keep the refill tip exactly in place. Higbee thread start to the pen body to make the thread action for replacing the refill better. Added a new locking feature that should keep the mechanism from unscrewing without the need for an o-ring or loctite. This version is 5.26" (133.6 mm) long, 0.38" (9.65 mm) in diameter, and weighs 41.5 g (1.46 oz).

products.body_html:
Preview Listing - Look out for an email when these are released.

A hefty C63000 Nickel Aluminum Bronze unit. I am liking rollerball refills more these days, but these refills may need some some tuning when replacing them. The metal tip often has a small burr where it joins, and I've had to use a bit of fine sandpaper to take it off.

Please note there is a limit of one item per customer for this release. 

I have a batch of these ready to go now for immediate shipment. Unfortunately I am unable to offer any extra units at this time, I have run out of springs. I am going to take some time while I am waiting for more, to work on a new clip design, and finish fixing my other milling machine before this running one breaks down again.

It will take me a few days to get them all shipped out after the release. Thanks for following along, let me know what you think about this design and send requests for future designs.

Round nose design in a 0.45" diameter with a C63000 Bronze clip less mechanism. Revised work holding and setup process keep mechanism details better in line than previous designs. No o-ring bumper for this design. Spring rates are pretty optimum removing the need for the bumper. Uses a larger 4 mm (0.1575") bearing ball and the same smaller diameter secondary spring. There is a t ight fit between the button stanchion and the mechanism body making it more resistant to binding from pressing the button on an angle. Improved mechanism button chamber features making button action smoother . Proper allowance for the refill and spring and mechanism is able to operate very smoothly, without the rough action of the refill and spring translating to the button. Made out of the tough and hard solid bar stock 6Al-4V Grade 5 Titanium. A single 0.45" (11.43 mm) diameter grip, round nose section and grip grooves with texture for grip. The mechanism comes equipped with stainless steel bearing balls. Tip details are extremely tight with a small land between the refill, and the conical section. Minimal and clean design coupled with the Uni-Ball Signo UMR-83 0.38mm refill . Pinch the mechanism between your index finger and thumb to retract the mechanism with a satisfying snap. The click and return is very solid and super satisfying. Tolerances, fit and finish for the mechanism are very close. Tip point details are very clean with an excellent tight fitting 2.35 mm diameter bore and a tolerance of just 25 micron to keep the refill tip exactly in place. Higbee thread start to the pen body to make the thread action for replacing the refill better. Added a new locking feature that should keep the mechanism from unscrewing without the need for an o-ring or loctite. This version is 5.33" (135.38 mm) long, 0.45" (11.43 mm) in diameter, and weighs 41.05 g (1.45 oz). Pens will ship over the next few days. Hopefully there are more to accommodate the demand. Thank you again!

Made out of the high grade Copper alloy C63000 Aluminum Nickel Bronze. A single 0.45" (11.43mm) diameter grip, stepped nose section and continuous body finish. The mechanism comes equipped with stainless steel bearing balls. Tip details are extremely tight with a small land between the refill, and the conical section. Step nose design in 0.45" diameter with a clipless mechanism. Revised work holding and setup process keep mechanism details better in line than previous designs. No o-ring bumper for this design. Spring rates are pretty optimum removing the need for the bumper. Uses a larger 4mm (0.1575") bearing ball and the same smaller diameter secondary spring. There is a t ight fit between the button stanchion and the mechanism body making it more resistant to binding from pressing the button on an angle. Improved mechanism button chamber features making button action smoother . Proper allowance for the refill and spring and mechanism is able to operate very smoothly, without the rough action of the refill and spring translating to the button. Minimal and clean design coupled with the Pilot G2 refill. Pinch the mechanism between your index finger and thumb to retract the mechanism with a satisfying snap. The click and return is very solid and super satisfying. Tolerances, fit and finish for the mechanism are very close. Tip point details are very clean with an excellent tight fitting 2.50 mm diameter bore and a tolerance of just 25 micron to keep the refill tip exactly in place. Higbee thread start to the pen body to make the thread action for replacing the refill better. Added a new locking feature that should keep the mechanism from unscrewing without the need for an o-ring or loctite. This version is 5.32" (135.1 mm) long, 0.45" (11.43 mm) in diameter, and weighs 67.1 g (2.37 oz).

products.title: 40 Click Clipped Pen - 6Al-4V Titanium - Round Nose -  ISO G2 (Parker)
products.body_text: I have figured out a new spring arrangement for the ISO G2 (Parker) refill that feels really good. Action is smooth and consistent with a lighter smoother feel. Clipless designs will be coming up again soon. Please note there is a limit of one item per customer for this release. This design will ship out March 14th. Made one at a time from solid 6Al-4V Titanium. The body diameter is 0.40" (10.16mm) with a rounded nose section and smooth uninterrupted finish. Minimal and clean design coupled with the Pentel Client refill . This design will fit all ISO G2 (Parker) refills. Unique one piece body design with no removable tip piece. Solid material is drilled out with a carbide drill perfectly true over an extreme diameter to depth radio, in order to fit the refills tightly without rattle. No batching ensures all of the parts fit perfectly together. Unparalleled warranty to ensure that you are entirely happy with fit, function and finish. The clip takes an excessive six individual operations to create a unique one piece clip and click mechanism. Pinch the mechanism between your index finger and thumb to retract the mechanism with a satisfying snap. The click and return is very solid and super satisfying. Tolerances, fit and finish for the mechanism are very close. Tip bore drill is aligned and offset with great care and is machined to a tolerance of just 0.001" or 25 micron to a 0.0995" (2.527mm) diameter bore to keep the refill tip exactly in place. Threading has a high quality higbee start to make replacing the refill easy. This version is 4.79" (121.67mm) long, 0.40" (10.16mm) in diameter, 27.2g (0.96oz) in weight and c omes equipped with a Pentel Client M 1.0mm refill. The mechanism comes fitted with black ceramic silicone nitride balls.

Made one at a time from solid 6Al-4V Titanium. The body diameter is 0.40" (10.16mm) with a rounded nose section and grip grooves. Minimal and clean design coupled with the Pilot G2 0.7mm refill. This design will fit all Pilot G2 refills.

Unique one piece body design with no removable tip piece. Solid material is drilled out with a carbide drill perfectly true over an extreme diameter to depth radio, in order to fit the refills tightly without rattle. No batching ensures all of the parts fit perfectly together. Unparalleled warranty to ensure that you are entirely happy with fit, function and finish.

The clip takes an excessive six individual operations to create a unique one piece clip and click mechanism. Pinch the mechanism between your index finger and thumb to retract the mechanism with a satisfying snap. The click and return is very solid and super satisfying. Tolerances, fit and finish for the mechanism are very close.

Tip bore drill is aligned and offset with great care and is machined to a tolerance of just 0.001" or 25 micron to a 2.5mm diameter bore to keep the refill tip exactly in place. Threading has a high quality higbee start to make replacing the refill easy.

This version is 5.27" (133.86mm) long, 0.40" (10.16mm) in diameter, 30.93g (1.09oz) in weight and comes equipped with a Pilot G2 0.7mm refill. The mechanism comes fitted with black ceramic silicone nitride balls.

products.title: 40 Clipless Click Pen x KVR Finishing - 6Al-4V Titanium - 6061 Aluminum Mechanism - Round Nose - Grip Lines - Pentel EnerGel
products.body_text: Please note there is a limit of one item per customer for this release. Short run anodized design blue to dark blue to copper fade by KVR Finishing. Super sleek round nose design for the Pentel EnerGel format refill. Includes an o-ring bumper that softens the return kickback to a nice thump. 0.40" body diameter with the same diameter mechanism. Includes all of the improvements from previous versions plus a few new ones. Retract mechanism is easier to push. The spring rate is more preferable for a slightly larger diameter mechanism. The 6061 Aluminum clipless mechanism, is bright and smooth. There is a t ight fit between the button stanchion and the mechanism body making it more resistant to binding from pressing the button on an angle. Improved mechanism button chamber features making button action even smoother . There is now a single detent track that improves the button bias depending on which side of the button is facing forward. Proper allowance for the refill and spring and mechanism is able to operate very smoothly, without the rough action of the refill and spring translating to the button. Made out of the tough and hard solid bar stock 6Al-4V Grade 5 Titanium and the bright 6061 Aluminum for the mechanism. A single 0.40" (10.16mm) diameter grip, rounded nose section and grip grooves. The mechanism comes equipped with clear borosilicate glass balls. Tip details are extremely tight with a small land between the refill, and the conical section. Minimal and clean design coupled with the Pentel EnerGel Metal Nose 0.7mm refill . Pinch the mechanism between your index finger and thumb to retract the mechanism with a satisfying snap. The click and return is very solid and super satisfying. Tolerances, fit and finish for the mechanism are very close. Tip point details are very clean with an excellent tight fitting 2.3mm diameter bore and a tolerance of just 25 micron to keep the refill tip exactly in place. Higbee thread start to the pen body to make the thread action for replacing the refill better. This version is 5.35" (135.9 mm) long, 0.40" (10.16mm) in diameter, and 28.5g (1.00oz) Pens will ship over the next few days. Hopefully there are more to accommodate the demand. Thank you again!
products.body_html:
Please note there is a limit of one item per customer for this release. Short run anodized design blue to dark blue to copper fade by KVR Finishing.

Super sleek round nose design for the Pentel EnerGel format refill. Includes an o-ring bumper that softens the return kickback to a nice thump. 0.40" body diameter with the same diameter mechanism. Includes all of the improvements from previous versions plus a few new ones. Retract mechanism is easier to push. The spring rate is more preferable for a slightly larger diameter mechanism. 

The 6061 Aluminum clipless mechanism, is bright and smooth. There is a tight fit between the button stanchion and the mechanism body making it more resistant to binding from pressing the button on an angle. Improved mechanism button chamber features making button action even smoother. There is now a single detent track that improves the button bias depending on which side of the button is facing forward. Proper allowance for the refill and spring and mechanism is able to operate very smoothly, without the rough action of the refill and spring translating to the button.

Made out of the tough and hard solid bar stock 6Al-4V Grade 5 Titanium and the bright 6061 Aluminum for the mechanism. A single 0.40" (10.16mm) diameter grip, rounded nose section and grip grooves. Minimal and clean design coupled with the Schmidt P8126 0.6mm refill. This refill is equipped with a Ruby ball and is extremely smooth and creates a consistent jet black line. This is a proper rollerball refill, full ink with a year cap off dry time. 

Pinch the mechanism between your index finger and thumb to retract the mechanism with a satisfying snap. The click and return is very solid and super satisfying. Tolerances, fit and finish for the mechanism are very close.

Tip point details are very clean with an excellent tight fitting 2.5mm diameter bore and a tolerance of just 25 micron to keep the refill tip exactly in place.

Higbee thread start to the pen body to make the thread action for replacing the refill better.

This version is 4.85" (123.2 mm) long, 0.40" (10.16mm) in diameter, and 27.2g (0.96oz)

Pens will ship over the next few days. Hopefully there are more to accommodate the demand. Thank you again!

products.title: 40 Click Pen - 6Al-4V Titanium - Cone Nose - Grip Lines - Pilot G2
products.body_text: Unfortunately I can't guarantee delivery by Christmas, but you can get one of these now. An all titanium version with a set of grip lines on a bumped out grip section. Made one at a time from solid 6Al-4V Titanium. A single 0.40" (10.16mm) diameter grip and a conical nose section. The mechanism comes equipped this time with a clear borosilicate ball. Tip details are the tightest yet, with the smallest land between the refill and the cone tip profile. Clip holds onto thinner materials and will flex to accommodate thicker materials. Unique one piece body design with no removable tip piece. Solid material is drilled out with a carbide drill perfectly true over an extreme diameter to depth radio, in order to fit the refills tightly without rattle. No batching ensures all of the parts fit perfectly together. Unparalleled warranty to ensure that you are entirely happy with fit, function and finish. The clip takes an excessive six individual operations to create a unique one piece clip and click mechanism. Tip bore drill is aligned and offset with great care and is machined to a tolerance of just 0.001" or 25 micron to a 2.5mm tip bore specifically for the Pilot G2. This pen will not fit ISO G2 refills with a spacer, the tip bore is too small by only another 0.001" to eliminate the most wiggle for this refill. Click the button down and then return it by pinching the mechanism between your fingers, and the button will snap back. Threading has a high quality higbee start to make replacing the refill super easy. This version is 5.28" (134.11mm) long, 0.40" (10.16mm) in diameter, and 28.50g (1.00 oz) and c omes equipped with a Fine Pilot G2 0.7mm.

products.title: 47 Click Pen - C110 Copper - Clipless - ISO G2 (Parker) - Conical Nose
products.body_text: Made out of the incredibly beautiful pure 99.9% C110 Copper . Raw machined copper looks unlike anything else but is very difficult to machine. Copper can be maintained shiny, or let to achieve a patina that shows the signs of its use. A single 0.47" (11.94mm) diameter grip and a conical nose section. The large solid copper body is extremely substantial and has some serious heft to it. Action with the heavier copper button is properly solid. Unique one piece body design with no removable tip piece. Solid material is drilled out with a drill perfectly true over an extreme diameter to depth radio, in order to fit the refills tightly without rattle. No batching ensures all of the parts fit perfectly together. Unparalleled warranty to ensure that you are entirely happy with fit, function and finish. Tip bore drill is aligned and offset with great care and is machined to a tolerance of just 0.001" or 25 micron to hold the tip of the Schmidt EasyFlow 9000 perfectly without any wiggle. Click the button down and then return it by pinching the mechanism between your fingers, and the button will snap back. Threading has a high quality higbee start to make replacing the refill super easy. This version is 4.87" (123.7 mm) long, 0.47" (11.94mm) in diameter, and 88.14g (3.11oz). Comes equipped with a Schmidt EasyFlow 9000 M ISO G2 (Parker)

products.body_text: Made out of the incredibly beautiful pure 99.9% C110 copper and 6061 Aluminum. Raw machined copper looks unlike anything else but is very difficult to machine. Copper can be maintained shiny, or let to achieve a patina that shows the signs of its use. A single 0.36" (9.14mm) diameter grip and a rounded nose section. No batching ensures all of the parts fit perfectly together. Unparalleled warranty to ensure that you are entirely happy with fit, function and finish. The clip takes an excessive six individual operations to create a unique one piece clip and click mechanism. Tip bore drill is aligned and offset with great care and is machined to a tolerance of just 0.001" or 25 micron to hold the tip of the Schimdt 9000 perfectly without any wiggle. Solid material is drilled out with a carbide drill perfectly true over an extreme diameter to depth radio, in order to fit the refills tightly without rattle. Click the button down and then return it by pinching the mechanism between your fingers, and the button will snap back. Threading has a high quality higbee start to make replacing the refill super easy. This version is 4.84" (123mm) long, 0.36" (9.1mm) in diameter, and 38.90 g (1.37 oz) Comes equipped with a Schmidt EasyFlow 9000 M ISO G2 (Parker)

products.title: 47 Click Pen - 6061 Aluminum - Clipless - Schmidt P8127
products.body_text: Brand new design based on the very first pens I made. An all new clipless mechanism uses a larger 4mm ball. The larger mechanism is very snappy and easy to use. Machined one at a time from solid 6061 Aluminum. This underrated material has a spectacular raw machined finish and is very lightweight. A 0.47" (10.67mm) diameter profile and cone nose section. This is the first design that is made to fit exclusively the Schmidt P8127 capless rollerball refill. This refill is extremely smooth but is a larger diameter so it will not fit in most other pens. Unique one piece body design with no removable tip piece. Solid material is drilled out with a drill perfectly true over an extreme diameter to depth radio, in order to fit the refills tightly without rattle. No batching ensures all of the parts fit perfectly together. Unparalleled warranty to ensure that you are entirely happy with fit, function and finish. Tip bore drill is aligned and offset with great care and is machined to a tolerance of just 0.001" or 25 micron to a 0.100" tip bore specifically for the Schmidt P8127 . Click the button down and then return it by pinching the mechanism between your fingers, and the button will snap back. Threading has a high quality higbee start to make replacing the refill super easy. This version is 4.84" (122.94mm) long, 0.47" (11.94mm) in diameter, and 28.7g (1.01oz) and c omes equipped with a medium Schmidt P8127 0.7mm.

products.title: 42 Click Pen - 6061 Aluminum - Round Nose - Pilot G2
products.body_text: Made one at a time from solid 6061 Aluminum. This underrated material has a spectacular raw machined finish and is very lightweight. A 0.42" (10.67mm) diameter grip and a rounded nose section. Tip details are the tightest yet, with the smallest land between the refill and the cone tip profile. Clip holds onto thinner materials and will flex to accommodate thicker materials. Unique one piece body design with no removable tip piece. Solid material is drilled out with a carbide drill perfectly true over an extreme diameter to depth radio, in order to fit the refills tightly without rattle. No batching ensures all of the parts fit perfectly together. Unparalleled warranty to ensure that you are entirely happy with fit, function and finish. The clip takes an excessive six individual operations to create a unique one piece clip and click mechanism. Tip bore drill is aligned and offset with great care and is machined to a tolerance of just 0.001" or 25 micron to a 2.5mm tip bore specifically for the Pilot G2. This pen will not fit ISO G2 refills with a spacer, the tip bore is too small by only another 0.001" to eliminate the most wiggle for this refill. Click the button down and then return it by pinching the mechanism between your fingers, and the button will snap back. Threading has a high quality higbee start to make replacing the refill super easy. This version is 5.28" (134.11mm) long, 0.42" (10.67mm) in diameter, and 19.6g (0.69oz) and c omes equipped with a Fine Pilot G2 0.7mm.

products.title: 38 Click Pen - 6Al-4V Titanium - Round Nose - Pentel EnerGel
products.body_text: Made one at a time from solid 6Al-4V Titanium. A single 0.38" diameter grip and a classic rounded nose section. Solid material is drilled out with a carbide drill perfectly true over an extreme diameter to depth radio. No batching ensures all of the parts fit perfectly together. Unparalleled warranty to ensure that you are entirely happy with fit, function and finish. The clip takes an excessive six individual operations to create a unique one piece clip and click mechanism. Tip bore drill is aligned and offset with great care and is machined to a tolerance of just 0.001" or 25 micron to hold the Pentel EnerGel perfectly without any wiggle. Click the button down and then return it by pinching the mechanism between your fingers, and the button will snap back. Threading has a high quality higbee start to make replacing the refill super easy. This version is 5.28" (134.11mm) long, 0.38" (9.65mm) in diameter, and 26.48g (0.93oz). Comes equipped with a 0.7mm Pentel EnerGel. Thank you to everyone who has helped make this pen a reality.

products.title: 38 Click Pen - 6Al-4V Titanium - Stepped Nose - Pilot G2
products.body_text: A new unique design with a single 0.38" diameter grip and stepped nose section. Made entirely out of the tough and hard solid bar stock 6Al-4V Grade 5 Titanium. Clip design is improved with a tighter fitting gap and more flexibility. The click and return is very solid and super satisfying. Tolerances, fit and finish for the mechanism are very close. Pinch the mechanism between your index finger and thumb to retract the mechanism with a satisfying snap. The click and return is excellent on this version. New enhanced tip bore size specifically for the Pilot G2. New 2.5mm (0.0984") drill yields a tighter fitting tip for the refill. Tolerance for these is 0.0984"-0.099" with a 0.099" pin as a no-go. Refill has no discernible wiggle. This is tighter than previous models that used a slightly larger drill and tolerance from 0.100"-0.101". Higbee thread start to pen body to make the thread action for replacing the refill better. This version will be 5.25" (133.4mm) long, 0.38" (9.65mm) in diameter, and 27.18g (0.96oz).

New enhanced tip bore size specifically for the Pilot G2. New 2.5mm (0.0984") drill yields a tighter fitting tip for the refill. products.body_text: A new unique design with a 0.40" diameter grip and stepped nose section. Made entirely out of the tough and hard solid bar stock 6Al-4V Grade 5 Titanium. I used a steel hammer on a piece of scrap material as a drift and it barely damaged it. The click and return is very solid and super satisfying. Tolerances, fit and finish for the mechanism are very close. Pinch the mechanism between your index finger and thumb to retract the mechanism with a satisfying snap. The click and return is excellent on this version. Clean design coupled with the excellent Pentel EnerGel 0.7mm needle nosed refill. Tip point details are very clean with an excellent tight fitting 2.3mm bore and a tolerance of just 25 micron to keep the refill tip exactly in place. Higbee thread start to pen body to make the thread action for replacing the refill better. This version will be 5.25" (133.4mm) long, 0.40" (10.2mm) in diameter, and 28.13g (0.99oz). Tip point details have been refined with a machined chamfer and clean facing. Button details are exceptionally clean with finer facing pass and tighter fit. Clip design is improved with a tighter fitting gap and more flexibility.

products.title: 38 Twist Action - 110 Copper - Pentel Energel 0.5mm Needle Nose
products.body_text: I have been getting lots of requests to bring back some copper twist pens back! I have made a few extras on top of the pre orders that have shipped out and I am offering those now. Copper is unlike any other material out there. This material is C110 Copper (99.99%) and it is difficult and picky to work with. The machined finishes glow. The weight and feel is super satisfying. Even weight distribution with excellent finish on the tube with slight texture from the machining lines. Has a hefty feel and is great to write with. Clean machined finishes right off of the machine. Twist mechanism is super simple and reliable. Carbide drill makes the hole in the tip at very precise tolerance of 25 micron. Comes with a very smooth Pentel Energel refill. I pay very close attention to the tolerances and surface finishes. 5-1/2" (140mm) long and 0.36" (9.1mm) in diameter. 42g (1.48oz) in weight.

Pinch the mechanism between your index finger and thumb to retract the mechanism with a satisfying snap. The click and return is excellent on this version. Tip point details are very clean with an excellent tight fitting 0.100+0.001" tip bore. Refill has no discernible wiggle Higbee thread start to pen body to make the thread action for replacing the refill better. This version is 5.25" (133.4 mm) long, 0.36" (9.1mm) in diameter, and 23.7g (0.84oz) For this pre order please only order this item! Pens will be shipped November 15th.
products.body_html:
Made entirely out of the tough and hard solid bar stock 6Al-4V Grade 5 Titanium.

Extremely minimal and clean design specifically made for the very popular Pilot G2 refill. 

The click and return is very solid and super satisfying. Tolerances, fit and finish for the mechanism are very close. Pinch the mechanism between your index finger and thumb to retract the mechanism with a satisfying snap. The click and return is excellent on this version.

Tip point details are very clean with an excellent tight fitting 0.100+0.001" tip bore. Refill has no discernible wiggle 

Higbee thread start to pen body to make the thread action for replacing the refill better.

This version is 5.25" (133.4 mm) long, 0.36" (9.1mm) in diameter, and 23.7g (0.84oz) 

For this pre order please only order this item! Pens will be shipped November 15th.

Extremely minimal and clean design coupled with the very excellent and fine Pentel EnerGel needle nose refill. The click and return is very solid and super satisfying. products.title: 36 Click Pen - 464 Brass - Schmidt EasyFlow 9000 - Step Nose - Deep Groove - 6061 Aluminum Clip
products.body_text: Do you like grippy pens? I have created a pen with a focus on have the most grip possible. Deep well defined grooves provide maximum grip and control. Made out of the very beautiful 464 Brass with a contrasting 6061 Aluminum clip. Comes equipped with an ISO G2 Parker style Schmidt EasyFlow 9000 refill. The click and return is incredibly good on this version. The return button is easy to press by pinching the mechanism between index finger and thumb. Button details are exceptionally clean with finer facing pass and tighter fit. Clip design is improved with a tighter fitting gap and more flexibility. Tip bore is super tight fitting and has a very tight tolerance of just 25 micron the refill has no discernible wiggle This version is 4.83" (122.8mm) long, 0.36" (9.1mm) in diameter, and 35.7g.
products.body_html:

products.title: 36 Click Pen - 464 Brass - Pentel Energel 0.5mm Needle Nose - Clipless - Round Nose
products.body_text: Finally a new clipless version! Lustrous 464 brass for the needle nosed Pentel Energel refill. Tip bore is sized 2.3mm for the needle nose refill. No discernible tip wiggle. I spent about a week making changes to the program and prototypes to make this mechanism better, more reliable and work in a super satisfying way. Cap threads have been lengthened and made coarser for more strength. Added the higbee blunt start to the cap and tube. Tip point details have been refined with a machined chamfer and clean facing. Button details are exceptionally clean with finer facing pass and tighter fit. This version is 5.27" (133.9 mm) long, 0.36" (9.1 mm) in diameter, and 40.0 g (1.41 oz)
products.body_html:
Finally a new clipless version! Lustrous 464 brass for the needle nosed Pentel Energel refill. 

Tip bore is sized 2.3mm for the needle nose refill. No discernible tip wiggle.

I spent about a week making changes to the program and prototypes to make this mechanism better, more reliable and work in a super satisfying way.

Cap threads have been lengthened and made coarser for more strength. Added the higbee blunt start to the cap and tube.

Tip point details have been refined with a machined chamfer and clean facing.

Button details are exceptionally clean with finer facing pass and tighter fit. 

This version is 5.27" (133.9 mm) long, 0.36" (9.1 mm) in diameter, and 40.0 g (1.41 oz)

products.title: 40 Click Pen - 6061 Aluminum - Schmidt EasyFlow 9000 - Clip and Grooves
products.body_text: I have created a few of these pens specially designed for the ISO G2 Parker refill. First time trying out this 0.40" grip diameter with the grip grooves in aluminum. Weight distribution is dead centre. Made out of the very shiny, lightweight, and economical 6061 Aluminum. Machined finishes are left completely raw for a unique lustrous appearance. The tip bore is sized perfectly at 0.100"+0.001" and the refill has no discernible wiggle. Comes equipped with a Schmidt EasyFlow 9000 refill. The click and return is incredibly good on this version. The return button is much easier to press with the soft part of your thumb. Cap threads have been lengthened and made coarser for more strength. Higbee blunt start is cleaner and more crisp. Tip point details have been refined with a machined chamfer and clean facing. Button details are exceptionally clean with finer facing pass and tighter fit. Clip design is improved with a tighter fitting gap and more flexibility. This version is 4.83" (122.7 mm) long, 0.40" (10.2 mm) in diameter, and 17.7 g (0.63 oz)

products.title: 42 Click Pen - *Pre-Order* - 6Al-4V Titanium - Pilot G2
products.body_text: I have been getting a lot of requests for older versions. So I have decided to offer a pre-order for some of these versions for delivery in the future. This way I can reliably plan for production times, and continue to innovate and make new designs. I will probably alternate between designs I have done before and new designs, prioritizing the delivery of existing pre-orders. This pre-order till be shipped out by or before September 9th. Made out of the very hard, tough, and scratch resistant 6Al-4V titanium. Comes equipped with an Pilot G2 0.5mm refill for the first time in this design. The click and return is incredibly good on this version. The return button is much easier to press with the soft part of your thumb. Photos shown are of the ISO G2 version, but this version with be 0.50" (12.7mm) longer. Some small details may change but t his version will be approximately 5.29*" (134.4mm) long, 0.42" (10.7mm) in diameter, and 28.70g (1.01oz). Tip point details have been refined with a machined chamfer and clean facing. Button details are exceptionally clean with finer facing pass and tighter fit. Clip design is improved with a tighter fitting gap and more flexibility. Tip bore is super tight fitting and the refill has no discernible wiggle.

Button details are exceptionally clean with finer facing pass and tighter fit. 

Clip design is improved with a tighter fitting gap and more flexibility.

Tip bore is super tight fitting and the refill has no discernible wiggle 

This version is 4.84" (123mm) long, 0.36" (9.1mm) in diameter, and 27.27g (0.96 oz)

products.title: 47 - 464 Brass - Twist Action -  ISO G2 (Parker)
products.body_text: After many requests I have finally made a throwback to my first pen design. This time the body is all in one piece. Action is triple started and I added Higbee thread start to pen body to make the thread action better. Super tight tip bore tolerances make sure the refill will not wiggle in the nose of the pen. Size of the bore is confirmed with measuring pins and the diameter is between 0.100-0.101". Made out of solid bar stock 464 Naval Brass, lead free. Comes equipped with a ballpoint style Black Schmidt ISO G2 (Parker) refill. This version is 4.82" (122.4 mm) long, 0.470." (11.9 mm) in diameter, and 71.1 g (2.51 oz) This version is available in aluminum and brass for now, but if you would like something please reach out to me! Requests inform me what I should be making next. I will be making this version in more materials soon. I would also like to do more nose styles for this design with some grip features too.

products.title: 36 Click Pen With Clip - Step Nose - 464 Brass - Rollerball (Pilot G2)
products.body_text: New profile for the rollerball refill pen with a clip. Step nose provides excellent visibility of the pen point and surrounding page. Grip grooves are exactly where grip is needed. Machined clip details have been improved and fit a larger range of fabric more securely. The click and return mechanism is smoother and easier to click and return. Added Higbee thread start to pen body to make the thread action better. Super tight tip bore tolerances make sure the refill will not wiggle in the nose of the pen. Size of the bore is confirmed with measuring pins and the diameter is between 0.100-0.101". Made out of solid bar stock 464 Naval Brass. Comes equipped with an Rollerball style Black Pilot G2 0.5mm refill. This version is 5.21" (132.3 mm) long, 0.36" (9.1mm) in diameter, and 21.0g (0.74oz) This version is available only in brass for now, but if you would like something please reach out to me! Requests inform me what I should be making next. I will be making a version of this pen for needle point refills with a tip diameter of 0.090"

products.title: 38 464 Brass - No Rings - Pilot G2 (Rollerball) - Brass Clip
products.body_text: This pen is exceptionally sturdy and the 464 brass is the toughest material I offer right now. Even weight distribution with excellent finish on the tube with slight texture from the machining lines. Has a hefty feel and is great to write with. Clean machined finishes right off of the machine. Twist mechanism with triple start screw thread is super simple and reliable. Carbide drill makes the hole in the tip at very precise tolerance of 25 micron. Comes with a very smooth writing rollerball style Pilot G2. I pay very close attention to the tolerances and surface finishes. 5-1/2" (140mm) long and 0.36" (9.1mm) in diameter. 42g (1.48oz) in weight. Come with a clip in matching material as a combination. I am really happy with this design. Everything about it is super simple, clean and functional.

Has a shockingly light feel and is great to write with. This pen feels lightweight but is definitely very sturdy. Aluminum will weather against harder materials you can keep it fresh or let it wear. Twist mechanism with triple start screw thread is super simple and reliable. Carbide drill makes the hole in the tip at very precise tolerance of 25 micron. Comes with a very smooth writing rollerball style Pilot G2. I pay very close attention to the tolerances and surface finishes. 5-1/2" (140mm) long and 0.36" (9.1mm) in diameter. 42g (1.48oz) in weight.

products.title: 38 Copper Top - Brass Body - Brass Clip - Rollerball Pilot G2
products.body_text: I just made a few of these fresh! Made from my favorite material 464 Naval Brass with a C110 Copper Top. This material is incredible. It is very tough, hard to scratch, doesn't tarnish, and has an incredible appearance. Decent heft to the body enough to make the pen feel substantial but not overly heavy in the pocket. Clean machined finishes straight off of the machines, made one at a time and I pay very close attention to the tolerances and surface finishes. 5-1/2" (140mm) long and 0.36" (9.1mm) in diameter. 39g (1.38oz) in weight. Super durable triple start screw mechanism. Carbide drill makes the hole in the tip at very precise tolerance of 25 micron. Rollerball style refills fit very snug in the tip leaving no room for the refill to click around in the pen. Comes with a very smooth writing Pilot G2 Refill and a matching brass clip.

products.body_html:
I have been getting lots of requests to bring back some copper twist pens back! This is a pre-order for and will be shipped out October 10th.

Copper is unlike any other material out there. This material is C110 Copper (99.99%) and it is difficult and picky to work with. The machined finishes glow. The weight and feel is super satisfying. Even weight distribution with excellent finish on the tube with slight texture from the machining lines.  Has a hefty feel and is great to write with. Clean machined finishes right off of the machine. 

Twist mechanism is super simple and reliable. Carbide drill makes the hole in the tip at very precise tolerance of 25 micron. Comes with a very smooth Pentel Energel refill. I pay very close attention to the tolerances and surface finishes. 5-1/2" (140mm) long and 0.36" (9.1mm) in diameter. 42g (1.48oz) in weight.

products.title: Copper Pen Tray
products.body_text: Three spot solid copper pen rest. Machined from a solid block of 110 copper.
products.body_html: Three spot solid copper pen rest. Machined from a solid block of 110 copper.

products.title: 38 Aluminum - ISO G2 (Parker)
products.body_text: This is the lightest pen, good for long periods of use. Even weight distribution with a very smooth finish on the aluminum tube with slight texture from the machining lines. Has a shockingly light feel and is great to write with. This pen feels lightweight but is definitely very sturdy. Aluminum will weather against harder materials you can keep it fresh or let it wear. Twist mechanism with triple start screw thread is super simple and reliable. Carbide drill makes the hole in the tip at very precise tolerance of 25 micron. Comes with a very smooth writing Parker style Schmidt P9000 EasyFlow. I pay very close attention to the tolerances and surface finishes. 5-1/4" (133mm) long and 0.36" (9.1mm) in diameter. 34g (1.2 oz) in weight.

products.title: 38 Brass Round Tip - Rollerball (Pilot G2)
products.body_text: I just made a few of these fresh! Made from my new favorite material 464 Naval Brass. This material is incredible. It is very tough, hard to scratch, doesn't tarnish, and has an incredible appearance. Decent heft to the body enough to make the pen feel substantial but not overly heavy in the pocket. Clean machined finishes straight off of the machines, made one at a time and I pay very close attention to the tolerances and surface finishes. 5-1/2" (140mm) long and 0.36" (9.1mm) in diameter. 39g (1.38oz) in weight. Super durable triple start screw mechanism. Carbide drill makes the hole in the tip at very precise tolerance of 25 micron. Rollerball style refills fit very snug in the tip leaving no room for the refill to click around in the pen. Comes with a very smooth writing Pilot G2 style metal body Schmidt 5888.

products.title: 38 Copper - ISO G2 (Parker)
products.body_text: This pen is heavier and feels substantial. Great weight means you have to use very little pressure to write. Made from difficult to machine super pure C110 Copper. Even weight distribution with excellent finish on the tube with slight texture from the machining lines. Has a hefty feel and is great to write with. This pen is exceptionally beautiful and the copper is like nothing else in appearance. Copper will weather against harder materials you can keep it fresh or let it wear. Copper will also tarnish or patina over time you can use polish and a waxy oil to keep it fresh or let it patina and create its own character. I need to add some pictures of patina and worn pens, they look great. Clean machined finishes right off of the machine. Twist mechanism is super simple and reliable. Carbide drill makes the hole in the tip at very precise tolerance of 25 micron. Parker refills fit very snug in the tip leaving no room for the refill to click around in the pen. Comes with a very smooth writing Parker style Schmidt P9000 EasyFlow. I will stand by every pen let me know if you ever have any issues and I will get them fixed. Precision machined all metal pen made one at a time by me on machines tools I maintain myself.

products.title: Pen Clips
products.body_text: *The copper is not a springy material - if you have to bend the clip then you have to bend it back - it does not spring back. If you want to use the clip on thicker materials/fabrics, order the brass or aluminum. Machined metal clip, using solid materials and made in six stages. The clip is attached by a set screw with a soft tip that won't mar the top piece and it's removable.
products.body_html:
*The copper is not a springy material - if you have to bend the clip then you have to bend it back - it does not spring back. If you want to use the clip on thicker materials/fabrics, order the brass or aluminum. 

Machined metal clip, using solid materials and made in six stages. The clip is attached by a set screw with a soft tip that won't mar the top piece and it's removable.
